mapper.select: select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, project_id as projectId, actor_id as actorId, role_key as roleKey, model_alias as modelAlias, capability as capability, brand_id as brandId, brand_name as brandName, brand_summary as brandSummary, client_name as clientName, user_prompt as userPrompt, status as status, output_text as outputText, output_uri as outputUri, error_message as errorMessage, provider_id as providerId, provider_model_name as providerModelName, provider_job_id as providerJobId, input_tokens as inputTokens, output_tokens as outputTokens, image_count as imageCount, video_seconds as videoSeconds, charge_amount as chargeAmount, settled as settled, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from tenant_generation_jobs where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by created_at desc

select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, project_id as projectId, actor_id as actorId, role_key as roleKey, model_alias as modelAlias, capability as capability, brand_id as brandId, brand_name as brandName, brand_summary as brandSummary, client_name as clientName, user_prompt as userPrompt, status as status, output_text as outputText, output_uri as outputUri, error_message as errorMessage, provider_id as providerId, provider_model_name as providerModelName, provider_job_id as providerJobId, input_tokens as inputTokens, output_tokens as outputTokens, image_count as imageCount, video_seconds as videoSeconds, charge_amount as chargeAmount, settled as settled, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from tenant_generation_jobs where id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: insert into tenant_generation_jobs ( id, tenant_id, project_id, actor_id, role_key, model_alias, capability, brand_id, brand_name, brand_summary, client_name, user_prompt, status, output_text, output_uri, error_message, provider_id, provider_model_name, provider_job_id, input_tokens, output_tokens, image_count, video_seconds, charge_amount, settled, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{projectId}, #{actorId}, #{roleKey}, #{modelAlias}, #{capability}, #{brandId}, #{brandName}, #{brandSummary}, #{clientName}, #{userPrompt}, #{status}, #{outputText}, #{outputUri}, #{errorMessage}, #{providerId}, #{providerModelName}, #{providerJobId}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{imageCount}, #{videoSeconds}, #{chargeAmount}, #{settled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) on conflict (id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, project_id = excluded.project_id, actor_id = excluded.actor_id, role_key = excluded.role_key, model_alias = excluded.model_alias, capability = excluded.capability, brand_id = excluded.brand_id, brand_name = excluded.brand_name, brand_summary = excluded.brand_summary, client_name = excluded.client_name, user_prompt = excluded.user_prompt, status = excluded.status, output_text = excluded.output_text, output_uri = excluded.output_uri, error_message = excluded.error_message, provider_id = excluded.provider_id, provider_model_name = excluded.provider_model_name, provider_job_id = excluded.provider_job_id, input_tokens = excluded.input_tokens, output_tokens = excluded.output_tokens, image_count = excluded.image_count, video_seconds = excluded.video_seconds, charge_amount = excluded.charge_amount, settled = excluded.settled, created_at = excluded.created_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
